UpdateSourceArgs: -c "cd stirling-pdf || exit 1; JAVA_VER=\"{{JavaRuntimeVersion}}\"; [ -z \"$JAVA_VER\" ] && JAVA_VER=25; if [ -x jre/bin/java ] && [ \"$(cat jre/.javaver 2>/dev/null)\" = \"$JAVA_VER\" ]; then echo \"JRE $JAVA_VER already installed, skipping\"; else echo \"Downloading Temurin JRE $JAVA_VER (x64)...\"; wget -qO jre.tar.gz \"https://api.adoptium.net/v3/binary/latest/$JAVA_VER/ga/linux/x64/jre/hotspot/normal/eclipse\" || { echo \"JRE download failed\"; exit 1; }; rm -rf jre; mkdir -p jre; tar -xzf jre.tar.gz -C jre --strip-components=1 || { echo \"JRE extract failed\"; exit 1; }; rm -f jre.tar.gz; chmod +x jre/bin/java; echo \"$JAVA_VER\" > jre/.javaver; echo \"JRE $JAVA_VER ready\"; fi"

-c "cd stirling-pdf || exit 1; JAVA_VER=\"{{JavaRuntimeVersion}}\"; [ -z \"$JAVA_VER\" ] && JAVA_VER=25; if [ -x jre/bin/java ] && [ \"$(cat jre/.javaver 2>/dev/null)\" = \"$JAVA_VER\" ]; then echo \"JRE $JAVA_VER already installed, skipping\"; else echo \"Downloading Temurin JRE $JAVA_VER (aarch64)...\"; wget -qO jre.tar.gz \"https://api.adoptium.net/v3/binary/latest/$JAVA_VER/ga/linux/aarch64/jre/hotspot/normal/eclipse\" || { echo \"JRE download failed\"; exit 1; }; rm -rf jre; mkdir -p jre; tar -xzf jre.tar.gz -C jre --strip-components=1 || { echo \"JRE extract failed\"; exit 1; }; rm -f jre.tar.gz; chmod +x jre/bin/java; echo \"$JAVA_VER\" > jre/.javaver; echo \"JRE $JAVA_VER ready\"; fi"
